A seemingly heavily intoxicated woman was teetering around in loops on a bicycle, doing her best to stay upright with the two large milk crates bungeed to the front and rear of the bike. It was at that point that the employees' smiles were wiped away as they realized what they were seeing. Two limp infants were nearly spilling out of the frontmost crate.
